entries.text: - 05:40 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike asleep. Disk 21% (45G free). No pending messages.
- 05:46 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike asleep. Disk 21% (45G free). No pending messages.

- 06:00 PDT — Morning briefing sent. Top 5 targets: Palo Alto Networks, Scotiabank Dallas, Booz Allen Hamilton, Stripe, Qualtrics. Cold email drafted for Palo Alto (CrowdStrike displacement angle). 30-company research file delivered.
- 06:16 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Morning briefing already sent at 06:00. No action needed.
- 06:40 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Morning briefing already sent at 06:00. No action needed.
- 06:46 PDT — Morning briefing sent (second wave — 6:46 AM).
- 07:16 PDT — Morning heartbeat. Sending briefing to Mike.
- 07:40 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Morning briefing already sent. No action needed.
- 07:46 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike is awake (active on Telegram). Pending: awaiting his reply on who/what to send.
- 08:16 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike active. Disk 21% (45G free). Conversations: sales data email drafted for Jon, ZoomInfo credit strategy discussed.
- 08:40 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike active. Disk 22% (41G free). No pending items.
- 08:46 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike active. Disk 21% (45G free). Recent convos: ZoomInfo credit strategy, sales data email drafted for Jon.
- 09:16 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike active. Discussed ZoomInfo credit strategy. Email draft prepared for Jon. Disk 21% (45G free).

- 09:40 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike at Alaska Airlines AI conference. Active networking: Charu Jain (CIO/CINO Alaska Airlines), Sam Choe (Port of Seattle Commissioner), Bernadette Berger (AI baggage handling session). High-value contacts in person.

- 09:46 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike at Alaska Airlines AI conference. Key contacts: Charu Jain (CINO, Alaska), Sam Choe (Port of Seattle Commissioner), Bernadette Berger (AI baggage handling). High-value networking in progress.
- 10:16 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike at Alaska Airlines AI conference. Chrome install pending (SolveWorks). ZoomInfo + Zoom + RingCentral credentials ready to activate.
- 10:40 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike active at conference. Chrome installed. Mid-session: logging into Zoom to pull YPO recording transcripts.

- 10:46 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike at Alaska Airlines AI conference. Chrome installed. Zoom login in progress (redirected to FB — needs retry). ZoomInfo credentials saved. RingCentral API creds pending. No urgent items.

- 11:16 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike at Alaska Airlines AI conference. Chrome installed. Zoom login in progress (Facebook OAuth redirect issue). ZoomInfo + Zoom credentials saved. RingCentral API creds pending from Mike's team. No urgent items.
- 11:40 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike active at conference. Chrome installed and working. YPO Recording #1 summarized. Recordings #2+ in queue.
